summary: A Go-based CLI orchestration tool featuring a parallel test runner, schema validation, and MCP integration, currently undergoing security hardening and test expansion.
architecture: monolithic CLI tool with internal modular packages
concerns: Highly fragmented test generation (many GOrchestra agent directories)
Security hardening recently applied suggests prior vulnerabilities in assertions and HTTP server
Incomplete smoke test renaming indicates ongoing refactoring churn
10 modified and 6 untracked files in git status suggest unstable working tree
suggestions: Consolidate or clean up the numerous GOrchestra agent test directories
Ensure all 12 missing assertion types are fully covered by integration tests
Resolve the untracked and modified files to stabilize the repository state
Focus on the MCP handlers and runner logic for upcoming feature development
